synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-23327 Oracle Linux 9 boost bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23327
description:
[1.75.0-13]
- Add Boost.JSON patch for detecting endianness (RHEL-120655)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-23327

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23327.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:
